message:
feat: wire mux watchdog into watcher, mux pool backend for get_text/list_panes/send_text

- Wire MuxWatchdog (ping + memory monitoring) into ft watch main loop
  so health checks actually run in production
- Add mux pool backend paths for get_text (via render_changes),
  list_panes, and send_text (write_to_pane/send_paste) with automatic
  CLI fallback on pool errors or unsupported features (escapes)
- Add wezterm_handle_from_config() for unified client construction
- Add pane_state module and session_topology module to lib.rs
- Minor orphan_reaper and wire_protocol cleanup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
